'''Lorn Moonrunner''', born as '''Corvus Langlier''', was the original owner of the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-4B]]. When he was younger, he dreamed of becoming an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] soldier and eventually attended the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Army Academy]] on a scholarship. As he was promoted, however, he saw more and more of the cruel actions of the Empire. As a computer programmer, he designed a program which could remote control [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], but when he discovered that his program was going to be used to attack planets resistant to Imperial rule, he defected. He had a wife called [[Artis Moonrunner|Artis]] and a son called [[Denel Moonrunner|Denel]], and they settled on [[Rhamalai]] with his family.
